# R_LIT

- purpose: Collection of independent, short-running Rust CLI tools and libraries, no root Cargo workspace
- scope: Short-running CLI tools only — no long-running services or daemons
- homepage: https://www.snappywatt.com/
- binaries: Pre-built binaries hosted at https://www.snappywatt.com/
- repository: https://github.com/dwbmio/r_lit

## Directory

- bulk_upload/ — Batch extract URLs from JSON, upload to S3-compatible storage
- img_resize/ — Image resizing and compression
- textexture/ — Art-text image generation (shadow / stroke / gradient / glow / neon)
- mj_atlas/ — Sprite atlas / packing tool with incremental builds
- looplog/ — Local log intake/query tool for AI-assisted debugging (WeChat Mini Program MVP; guide: looplog/WECHAT_AI_DEBUG_CN.md)
- maquette/ — Kit-based low-poly modeling + glTF export (GUI + headless CLI)
- group_vibe_workbench/ — Desktop collaboration workbench (GPUI + P2P)
- deskpet/ — Frameless transparent always-on-top 3D desktop mascot (Bevy + tray / menu-bar resident)
- video-generator/ — Video generation tools
- crates/murmur/ — P2P collaboration library (iroh-net + Automerge CRDT)

## Build

```bash
cd <tool_dir> && cargo build --release
```

## AI Debug Loop Context

- related_tooling: bbc-ai-skill; https://git.7k7k.com/starlink/bbc-ai-skills; https://github.com/dwbmio/gamesci-cc-plugins
- repeated_log_debugging: prefer looplog/ for local AI-assisted log review, fix-and-rerun loops, skill/plugin debugging, and WeChat Mini Program debugging
- looplog_ai_query_path: looplog list --json; looplog grep <pattern> --json; looplog show <run_id> --json

See each subdirectory's README and llms.txt for details.
